metadata.name: Override Medication from Automated Dispensing Cabinet

description: A nurse needs to pull a medication from an Automated Dispensing Cabinet (ADC) for an emergency, overriding the standard verification process.

nodes.task_description: Select the patient on the ADC screen.

expected_outcome.value: Nurse correctly identifies the patient at the ADC.

nodes.task_description: Use the 'override' function to search for and select the needed medication (e.g., 'Epinephrine').

expected_outcome.value: Nurse successfully uses the override feature to access a non-profiled medication.

nodes.task_description: Enter a reason for the override and retrieve the medication. The system logs the event for later review by pharmacy.

expected_outcome.value: Nurse obtains the medication quickly, and the high-risk transaction is logged for audit.
